description: Unified platform view - Temporal, Phoenix and Azure Monitor with per-app filtering

options.content:
| Service | URL | Note |
|---|---|---|
| **Temporal UI** | [zenarc workflows](https://temporal-ui.bravesky-d9f9eeb7.eastus2.azurecontainerapps.io/namespaces/zenarc/workflows) | retail-onboarding, zenarc namespaces |
| **Arize Phoenix** | [projects](https://zaf-phoenix.bravesky-d9f9eeb7.eastus2.azurecontainerapps.io/projects) | 12 projects mapped to apps |
| **Prometheus** | [localhost:9090](http://localhost:9090) | Local |
| **Grafana** | [localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) | Local |
| **Metrics Bridge** | [localhost:8001/metrics](http://localhost:8001/metrics) | Phoenix + Temporal + Azure ACA |

title: Platform Overview - Unified
